summary: Digital Omnibus proposal would link high-risk application dates to support-tool availability. Latest application dates revised to 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III high-risk) and 2 Aug 2028 (Annex I product-linked high-risk), conditional on support-tool availability. Original 2 Aug 2026 baseline preserved until formal adoption.

source.citation: European Commission AI Act standardisation page (consulted 2026-05-16)

summary: First international standard for AI management systems (AIMS). Establishes a PDCA cycle for organisations developing, providing or using AI; integrates with ISO/IEC 27001 + 27701.

source.citation: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 — Information technology — Artificial intelligence — Management system

summary: PCI SSC published v4.0.1 — clarifications + minor corrections to v4.0. No new requirements. Future-dated requirements (Req. 8.3.6, 12.10.4.1, etc.) remain best-practice until 31 March 2025, then mandatory.

source.citation: PCI DSS v4.0.1 (PCI Security Standards Council, June 2024)
